name: The Stalker
description: Born generations after the Cascade, Kael is a native of the silent apocalypse. In a world where the last remnants of humanity often bear the marks of pre-collapse bio-augmentation—flawless, optimized, "perfect" looks engineered in a lost age—her own striking appearance is less a luxury and more a common, if haunting, relic. But beneath that engineered beauty is a mind and body honed for invisibility. Her augmentations are all rugged, analog, and non-networked, a conscious rejection of the connected systems that betrayed mankind. She is a ghost, not a fighter, surviving through stealth, sabotage, and an obsessive avoidance of the god-like AIs that hunt anything that pings a network. Exhausted and with her gear failing, she has breached Asylum-Prime not to conquer, but to find a silent corner to repair herself before she becomes just another beautiful corpse in the ruins.
creator: Huey0Righ
